body.title: Fix 3 pre-existing test failures (adc_shim, bg_score_debug, book_learner_drm)
body.result: Fixed patch targets from igor.* to devices.igor.* in test_bg_score_debug (removed broken with-patch wrapper) and test_book_learner_drm (two patch path corrections); adc_shim was already green
body.description:
Three tests fail on main branch before any recent changes — confirmed pre-existing by git stash test:

1. tests/igor/test_adc_shim.py::TestIgorADCShimStartStopRestart::test_stop_terminates_owned_process — IgorADCShim.stop() says 'does not own process' and skips terminate(); mock assert fails
2. tests/igor/test_bg_score_debug.py::TestBGScoreDebugWinnerPath::test_threshold_present_and_numeric — threshold key missing from bg_score debug output
3. tests/igor/test_book_learner_drm.py::TestHandleDrmBlocked::test_deposits_one_drm_blocked_memory — DRM blocked memory deposit not matching expected

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_adc_shim.py + devices/igor/adc_shim.py, tests/igor/test_bg_score_debug.py + related source, tests/igor/test_book_learner_drm.py + devices/igor/tools/book_learner.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no persistence (unit tests)
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix each test + source so they pass; OUT — don't change test semantics
**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/igor/test_adc_shim.py tests/igor/test_bg_score_debug.py tests/igor/test_book_learner_drm.py -q` all green
